def negative_toml_or_ini_config_file_parsed_on_request_path():
    rule_id = "toml_or_ini_config_file_parsed_on_request_path"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "TOML, INI, or YAML config file parsed inside a request handler on every request."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
